case_title: AUTO RETURN VS AVILA, ESPERANZA LUZ

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR NOTICE OF INTENTION TO ISSUE AMENDED AND CORRECTED JUDGMENT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE BY MAIL RE: ISSUANCE OF AMENDED JUDGMENT, RETURNED MAIL SENT TO DEFENDANT AVILA, EXPERANZA LUZ, "FORWARD TIME EXPIRED".
ORDER FOR AMENDED JUDGMENT RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY 28, 2010
RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: AS TO DEFENDANT AVILA, ESPERANZA LUZ
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTO RETURN AS TO DEFENDANT AVILA, ESPERANZA LUZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTO RETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVILA, ESPERANZA LUZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,665.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTO RETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVILA, ESPERANZA LUZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AVILA, ESPERANZA LUZ
